title: Figma Stock Slides As AI Design Agents Challenge Growth Story
description: Figma (NYSE:FIG) reported its best quarter to date alongside continued strong customer growth. At the same time, new AI-powered design agents are raising concerns about potential disruption to Figma's collaborative design platform. The stock trades at $21.27, with a 30.8% decline over the past month and a 43.4% decline year to date. Figma sits at an interesting crossroads. The company has reported its strongest quarter so far and ongoing customer growth, yet the share price of $21.27 comes...

title: AI will cause waves of layoffs in repetitive manual jobs: QED Investors’ Nigel Morris
description: QED Investors’ cofounder and managing partner Nigel Morris expects that artificial intelligence (AI) will have a significant impact on employment in the near term. Those performing repetitive manual tasks will be the hardest hit, he added. “The population that is doing manual repetitive tasks is going to shrink dramatically. I think we are going to [...]

title: AI tax scams surge ahead of filing deadline, Better Business Bureau says
description: With the tax filing deadline fast approaching, the Better Business Bureau (BBB) in San Antonio is warning taxpayers about a growing and increasingly sophisticated threat: scams powered by artificial intelligence.

title: Antioch Man Spun Bizarre Phone Tale Before AI Child Porn Bust
description: Stuart M. Lowrey, 35, was charged with five counts of producing child pornography after investigators say he made AI‐generated sexual videos of a child.

title: US Tech Firms Cut Jobs Amid AI Rollout
